title: Create: Netherite Factory
description: A way to get infinite netherite scraps using create!
body:
This mod adds a way to get infinite netherite scraps using cinder flour, wet cinder flour, dried cinder flour and compressed cinder flour! The chance to actually get a netherite scrap from the mod is less than 1%.

 To get the netherite scraps there is a whole process of stuff. first, you need to get a cobblestone farm, the easiest you can think of, then you send the cobblestone to bulk haunting.

It haunts into blackstone, send it through the bulk haunting again and you got yourself netherrack!

 You take the netherrack and put it through crushing wheels it turns to cinder flour.

Now, send the cinder flour under a spout filled with water and you get wet cinder flour!

Now you take the wet cinder flour and you can either smelt it, or bulk smelt it with an encased fan and lava or campfires!

Now you've got yourself some dried cinder flour! Take it and put it under a mechanical press and you get compressed cinder flour!

Now the last part, you take the compressed cinder flour and put it through a bulk washing setup, and if you are lucky enough, you get a netherite scrap! 



(This is my first ever mod, so there might be bugs I am sorry if you encounter some bugs.)
